=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:22-6:5) TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("test") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen"

[D2] (9:22-12:5) TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("named") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen"

[D3] (15:22-17:5) TS377011: `Effect.fnUntraced` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen"

[D4] (20:22-20:67) TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("arrow") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"

[D5] (23:22-25:5) TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("func") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"

[D6] (28:22-30:31) TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("piped") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen"

[D7] (33:22-35:31) TS377011: `Effect.fnUntraced` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen"

[D8] (46:20-48:3) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE
export const iife1 = Effect.gen(function* () {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
})

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE with return
export const iife2 = Effect.fn("named")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  return 42
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator IIFE
export const iife3 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - arrow function (non-generator)
export const iife4 = Effect.fn("arrow")(() => Effect.succeed(1))()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - function expression (non-generator)
export const iife5 = Effect.fn("func")(function() {
  return Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - generator with pipe arguments
export const iife6 = Effect.fn("piped")(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator with pipe arguments
export const iife7 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (generator)
export const myFn = Effect.fn("myFn")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (regular function)
export const myFn2 = Effect.fn("myFn2")(() => Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - Effect.gen (not Effect.fn)
export const gen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - regular function call
export const regularFn = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)
export const result = regularFn(1)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE
export const iife1 = Effect.fn("test")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE with return
export const iife2 = Effect.gen(function* () {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return 42;
})

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator IIFE
export const iife3 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - arrow function (non-generator)
export const iife4 = Effect.fn("arrow")(() => Effect.succeed(1))()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - function expression (non-generator)
export const iife5 = Effect.fn("func")(function() {
  return Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - generator with pipe arguments
export const iife6 = Effect.fn("piped")(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator with pipe arguments
export const iife7 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (generator)
export const myFn = Effect.fn("myFn")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (regular function)
export const myFn2 = Effect.fn("myFn2")(() => Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - Effect.gen (not Effect.fn)
export const gen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - regular function call
export const regularFn = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)
export const result = regularFn(1)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE
export const iife1 = Effect.fn("test")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE with return
export const iife2 = Effect.fn("named")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  return 42
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator IIFE
export const iife3 = Effect.gen(function* () {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
})

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - arrow function (non-generator)
export const iife4 = Effect.fn("arrow")(() => Effect.succeed(1))()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - function expression (non-generator)
export const iife5 = Effect.fn("func")(function() {
  return Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - generator with pipe arguments
export const iife6 = Effect.fn("piped")(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator with pipe arguments
export const iife7 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (generator)
export const myFn = Effect.fn("myFn")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (regular function)
export const myFn2 = Effect.fn("myFn2")(() => Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - Effect.gen (not Effect.fn)
export const gen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - regular function call
export const regularFn = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)
export const result = regularFn(1)


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE
export const iife1 = Effect.fn("test")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE with return
export const iife2 = Effect.fn("named")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  return 42
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator IIFE
export const iife3 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - arrow function (non-generator)
export const iife4 = Effect.fn("arrow")(() => Effect.succeed(1))()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - function expression (non-generator)
export const iife5 = Effect.fn("func")(function() {
  return Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - generator with pipe arguments
export const iife6 = Effect.gen(function* () {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(1);
}).pipe(Effect.map(n => n + 1))

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator with pipe arguments
export const iife7 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (generator)
export const myFn = Effect.fn("myFn")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (regular function)
export const myFn2 = Effect.fn("myFn2")(() => Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - Effect.gen (not Effect.fn)
export const gen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - regular function call
export const regularFn = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)
export const result = regularFn(1)


=== [D7] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE
export const iife1 = Effect.fn("test")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE with return
export const iife2 = Effect.fn("named")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  return 42
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator IIFE
export const iife3 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - arrow function (non-generator)
export const iife4 = Effect.fn("arrow")(() => Effect.succeed(1))()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - function expression (non-generator)
export const iife5 = Effect.fn("func")(function() {
  return Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - generator with pipe arguments
export const iife6 = Effect.fn("piped")(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator with pipe arguments
export const iife7 = Effect.gen(function* () {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(1);
}).pipe(Effect.map(n => n + 1))

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (generator)
export const myFn = Effect.fn("myFn")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (regular function)
export const myFn2 = Effect.fn("myFn2")(() => Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - Effect.gen (not Effect.fn)
export const gen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - regular function call
export const regularFn = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)
export const result = regularFn(1)


=== [D8] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE
export const iife1 = Effect.fn("test")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - curried generator IIFE with return
export const iife2 = Effect.fn("named")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  return 42
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator IIFE
export const iife3 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - arrow function (non-generator)
export const iife4 = Effect.fn("arrow")(() => Effect.succeed(1))()

// Should trigger (WITHOUT fix) - function expression (non-generator)
export const iife5 = Effect.fn("func")(function() {
  return Effect.succeed(1)
})()

// Should trigger (with fix) - generator with pipe arguments
export const iife6 = Effect.fn("piped")(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should trigger (with fix) - fnUntraced generator with pipe arguments
export const iife7 = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
}, Effect.map((n) => n + 1))()

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (generator)
export const myFn = Effect.fn("myFn")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// Should NOT trigger - stored for reuse (regular function)
export const myFn2 = Effect.fn("myFn2")(() => Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - Effect.gen (not Effect.fn)
export const gen = Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger - regular function call
export const regularFn = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)
export const result = regularFn(1)
